name: reelkit
description: AI video pipelines for Claude Code: a live-action promo-reel editor (demucs/whisper/rembg + ffmpeg compositing), a code-driven motion-graphics film renderer (GSAP + headless Chromium + ffmpeg), plus campaign mode — music-first beat-locked scripting, keyless CC asset casting, and multi-agent parallel reel builds. Drive everything from a short per-brand brief.
